OpenAI GPT-5.6 Sol

Endpoint name: databricks-gpt-5-6-sol

Supported inputs: text, image

GPT-5.6 Sol is a reasoning model with a 1.05M total token context window with 128K maximum output tokens and complex tool use.

Google Gemini 3.5 Flash

Endpoint name: databricks-gemini-3-5-flash

Supported inputs: text, image, video, audio

Gemini 3.5 Flash is a multimodal model with function calling, structured output, and a 1-million-token context window.

Google Gemini 3 Pro Image

Endpoint name: databricks-gemini-3-pro-image

Supported inputs: text, image

A single request can return generated images alongside text.

Anthropic Claude Sonnet 5

Endpoint name: databricks-claude-sonnet-5

Supported inputs: text, image

Claude Sonnet 5 is a hybrid reasoning model for agentic work.

Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6

Endpoint name: databricks-claude-sonnet-4-6

Supported inputs: text, image

Claude Sonnet 4.6 is a hybrid reasoning model with a 1 million token context window.

Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4

Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4 is deprecated.

Endpoint name: databricks-claude-sonnet-4

Supported inputs: text, image

Claude Sonnet 4 is a hybrid reasoning model with a 200K token context window.

Alibaba Cloud Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B

The model is in Public Preview.

Endpoint name: databricks-qwen3-embedding-0-6b

Supported inputs: text

Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B handles long contexts up to ~32K tokens and produces embeddings.

GTE Large (En)

Endpoint name: databricks-gte-large-en

Supported inputs: text

GTE maps text to a 1024-dimension embedding vector and an embedding window of 8192 tokens.

Zhipu AI GLM 5.2

Endpoint name: databricks-glm-5-2

Supported inputs: text

GLM 5.2 is a reasoning model with a 1 million token context window.
